store.title: Point Store
store.subtitle: Exchange your earned points for eco-friendly rewards

loginRequired.title: Login Required
loginRequired.description: Please log in to exchange points for products

noProducts.title: No Products Available
noProducts.description: There are currently no products available for exchange. Please check back later.

filters.title: Filter Products
filters.quickDescription: Start with keywords and quick categories, then narrow the list with more precise filters.
filters.tagPlaceholder: Search or type to add tags
filters.tagHint: Press Enter to quickly create a new tag when no match appears.
filters.advancedDescription: Refine results further with category, points range, tags, and sorting.
filters.refinedResults: Adjust the fields, then apply the advanced filter set in one go.

exchange.title: Confirm Exchange
exchange.subtitle: Please confirm your exchange details
exchange.addressHint: For virtual rewards, please enter your email address. We've pre-filled your account email for convenience.
exchange.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number (digits, spaces, or hyphen)
exchange.areaCodeRequired: Area code is required when providing a phone number
exchange.invalidAreaCode: Please enter a valid area code
exchange.phoneRequiredWhenAreaCode: Please provide a phone number when an area code is supplied
exchange.phoneOptionalHint: Leave this blank if you're exchanging a virtual product.
exchange.confirmText: Are you sure you want to exchange {{points}} points for this item?

history.title: Exchange History
history.subtitle: Review the rewards you've redeemed and track delivery updates in one place.
history.noNotes: No notes were submitted for this exchange.
history.noRecordsDescription: Once you redeem a reward from the store, it will appear here.
history.emptyDescription: Redeem something from the store and the full record will appear here.
history.emptyFilteredDescription: Nothing matches the current filters. Try broadening the search, status, or date range.

filters.searchHeading: Find the order first, then narrow it down
filters.searchDescription: Search by exchange UUID, product name, tracking number, or notes.
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search UUID, product, tracking number, or notes
filters.searchHint: Basic search is for fast lookup. Advanced filters are better for combining status, date, and sort rules.
filters.advancedDescription: Use status, date range, and sorting to refine results without cramming everything into one field.
filters.refinedResults: Advanced filters stay in draft until you confirm them, so browsing is not interrupted on every change.

errors.loginRequired: Please log in before making an exchange
